name: coding-debugger
description: AI-assisted debugging memory for coding agents with verdict-based retrieval, pattern extraction, deep root-cause workflows, and parallel domain assessment.

interface.shortDescription: AI-assisted debugging memory and root-cause workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: AI-assisted debugging memory for coding agents with verdict-based retrieval, pattern extraction, deep root-cause workflows, and parallel domain assessment. Keeps the old package/CLI path compatible while exposing a clearer Coding Debugger plugin surface.
